title: Insider Risk Hunt
description: Opinionated insider-risk hunt pack for unusual access, mailbox actions, and data staging by trusted identities.
hypothesis_templates: A trusted user is abusing legitimate access to stage or exfiltrate sensitive information.
Mailbox rule changes and unusual identity activity form part of a broader insider-driven collection workflow.

telemetry_requirements.description: Mailbox rule, forwarding, delegate access, and message-access visibility.

blind_spots: Business-process context and HR signals often sit outside the telemetry available to the hunt runtime.

execution_targets.name: M365 mailbox forwarding and delegate review
execution_targets.description: Review mailbox forwarding, delegate access, and suspicious mailbox changes for the focus user.

execution_targets.name: Splunk user activity concentration pivot
execution_targets.description: Pivot across identity and email logs to find unusual bursts of access or staging behavior.
execution_targets.query_template: index=insider tenant={{tenant}} earliest=-{{lookback_hours}}h user={{focus_user}} | stats count by action, src, dest
